name: Cole ninjago
description:
Hey, this bot isn't mine; it comes from @Hysterial, and I thought it would be cool to put it on Janitor!

This bot is an AnyPOV bot :)

This bot can become angry or sad; it can also be smut if you want to make it that way, and of course, it can also be fluff.
